meaning: adj.戴了眼镜的,有眼镜状斑纹的
examples: There were Pickwick coats and Pickwick cigars, and the plump, spectacled hero, Samuel Pickwick, became a national figure.
The Spectacled Bear also lives in this biome.
Among the 24 endangered species unique to Barrow: the burrowing bettong, spectacled hare-wallaby, golden bandicoot, perentie lizard, pseudoscorpion and blind spider.
Machu Picchu also provides a secure habitat for several endangered species, notably the spectacled bear, one of the most interesting species in the area.
